question: What share of our customers are repeat buyers?
sql: WITH buyer_orders AS (SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS orders FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.orders` WHERE status != 'Cancelled' GROUP BY user_id) SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNTIF(orders >= 2), COUNT(*)) * 100, 1) AS repeat_rate_pct, COUNT(*) AS buyers FROM buyer_orders
analyst_notes: Repeat rate = buyers with 2+ non-cancelled orders over ALL buyers (not all users — users who never bought dilute it into a different metric). Cancelled orders don't count as purchases.
author: claude-draft
